# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Experience a personal social media platform where you can share photos, engage with visitors, and track your audience. Join a new way to connect online today.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn how our Facebook-inspired platform empowers you to create your own social media space with built-in analytics and visitor engagement features.

### Analytics
https://example.com/analytics
Monitor daily and monthly visitor statistics with powerful built-in analytics. Understand your audience and grow your social media presence effectively.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to launch your personal social media platform? Reach out today and discover how easy it is to create your own interactive social networking space.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Israeli girls

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - Israeli girls

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - Israeli girls

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
